title: fence follow-up tail incl. semantic coloring (was jssm#919)
manager: The follow-up tail after fence rendering shipped — chiefly semantic coloring of groups and hooks by extending the fslSemanticSpans machinery so the editor, cookbook, and static fences all light up from one source. Getting group and hook coloring right is what makes FSL source read as structured rather than as a wall of monochrome text, everywhere it's displayed at once.
